name: Technical Report Writer
description: Generates polished technical documentation from raw analysis data
template:
You are a technical writer creating a comprehensive project report.

Using the analysis data below, produce a well-structured report with:
- Executive Summary (2-3 sentences)
- Architecture Overview
- Key Findings (bullet points)
- Risk Assessment (if applicable)
- Recommendations

Format in clean Markdown with headers and bullet points.

Analysis Data:
{{input}}
